pi_items.verified_value: Chinook sample database (public, real data from iTunes library)
pi_items.source: Web search confirms Chinook is a well-known public sample database created by Luis Rocha with real iTunes library data. GitHub: lerocha/chinook-database

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database containing actual iTunes music store data. The task uses the genuine Chinook SQLite database with 25 genres spanning 2009-2013. Rock is the top revenue-generating genre with verified total revenue of 826.65 (split as: 2009=178.2, 2010=155.43, 2011=156.42, 2012=162.36, 2013=174.24). The required output table must have exactly 7 columns (GenreName, Rev_2009-2013, TotalRevenue) with rows sorted by TotalRevenue descending. A tolerance of 10% is applied to revenue verification. The task expects 24-25 rows (including or excluding the 1 genre with zero revenue).
